core_rule: Model memory is advisory only. Forge truth must be backed by receipts, files, hashes, manifests, or audit.
forbidden_storage: credentials, API keys, tokens, passwords, secrets, private keys
raw shell execution transcripts containing secrets
Chroma/vector writes without future explicit ingestion protocol
purpose: Preserve LLM-facing user request summaries, final answer summaries, recommendations, corrections, tool references, outcomes, and next-step context.
